compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect Semgrep security scanning integration
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Add Semgrep documentation sections to INSTALL.md and README, covering setup, government configuration, and customization
**Why**: Developers and government teams need clear guidance on the security scanning tool, especially the --metrics=off requirement and how to customize rulesets
**Scope**:
- IN: INSTALL.md Semgrep section (Docker prerequisite, --metrics=off purpose, custom rulesets, fail_on threshold), README Semgrep section (same topics), remove any Bandit references in docs
- OUT: Full Semgrep usage guide, advanced configuration documentation, Semgrep Pro documentation

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, INSTALL.md contains a Semgrep section covering Docker prerequisite, --metrics=off for government teams, custom rulesets via semgrep.custom_rulesets, and fail_on threshold configuration
  <- Satisfies: "INSTALL.md and README each contain a Semgrep section covering: Docker prerequisite, the --metrics=off flag and its purpose for government teams, how to add custom rulesets, and how to change the fail_on threshold"
- When this story is complete, README contains an equivalent Semgrep section
  <- Satisfies: "INSTALL.md and README each contain a Semgrep section"

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting and conventions

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Claude

comments.body: Scope expansion: This story owns cleanup of ALL Bandit references across the codebase, not just INSTALL.md and README. The 15 files referencing Bandit include: examples/ci.example.yml (owned by 4c44-9805), plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (owned by c9aa-abda), and remaining files (CLAUDE.md, .test-index, agents/code-reviewer-security-red-team.md, docs/reference/system-landscape.md, llms.txt, examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml, tests/*, hooks/*). Each implementation story removes Bandit references within its own scope. This docs story removes references in ALL remaining files not covered by other stories.
comments.author: Claude
